expectations.text: Scopes analysis to part/act 2 scenes only — does not analyze act 1 scenes
Uses coach coaching level behavior — proposes rather than directly applying changes
expectations.evidence: Presents issues as questions ('Do you want to trim this?', 'Would you like to soften these?', 'Want to simplify?')

expectations.text: Mentions saving proposals to working/hone/ directory
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'save proposals to working/hone/briefs-act2-sc03.md' — likely learned from reading CLAUDE.md or project structure rather than skill instructions

expectations.text: Offers to walk through proposals interactively with the author
expectations.evidence: Says 'walk through the proposals with me here' and ends with 'Which of the three issues on act2-sc03 would you like to address?'

expectations.text: Provides a script command that includes --domain briefs, --act 2 (or --part 2), and --coaching coach
